mapper.select:
SELECT tbiic.INVM_FILD_CD AS INVM_FILD_CD , tbiic.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS INVM_FILD_CDNM , tbiic.USE_YN
, tbiic.RGSN_USER_ID , tbiic.RGSN_TS , tbiic.AMNN_USER_ID , tbiic.AMNN_TS
, tbiic.INVM_FILD_CD AS ID , tbiic.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS VALUE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C tbiic WHERE tbiic.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT tbiic.INVM_FILD_CD AS INVM_FILD_CD , tbiic.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS INVM_FILD_CDNM , tbiic.USE_YN
, tbiic.BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID AS IMG_FILE_ID , tbiic.BNNR_IMG_FILE_ID AS FILE_ID
, tbiic.RGSN_USER_ID , tbiic.RGSN_TS , tbiic.AMNN_USER_ID , tbiic.AMNN_TS
, tbiic.INVM_FILD_CD AS ID , tbiic.INVM_FILD_CDNM AS VALUE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_INVM_FILD_C tbiic WHERE tbiic.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT UTLZ_TCHN_CD , UTLZ_TCHN_CDNM , USE_YN , RGSN_USER_ID , RGSN_TS , AMNN_USER_ID , AMNN_TS
, UTLZ_TCHN_CD AS ID , UTLZ_TCHN_CDNM AS VALUE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_UTLZ_TCHN_C WHERE USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT ccd.COM_CD_ID , ccd.GRP_CD_ID , cgm.GRP_CD_NM , ccd.COM_CD_NM , ccd.COM_CD_DESC , ccd.LNP_SQN , ccd.USE_YN
, ccd.COM_CD_ID AS ID , ccd.COM_CD_NM AS VALUE FROM TB_BOX_IVT_COM_CD_D ccd INNER JOIN TB_BOX_IVT_COM_GRP_M cgm ON ccd.GRP_CD_ID = cgm.GRP_CD_ID WHERE ccd.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ccd.GRP_CD_ID = #{grpCdId} ORDER BY ccd.LNP_SQN
